homepage.title: Elevación de cargas segura y ergonómica | TAWI
homepage.description: Mejora la ergonomía en todos los sectores con los elevadores/manipuladores por vacío TAWI. Reduce las lesiones, agiliza los procesos y aumenta la productividad diaria.

Madera, acero y vidrio
Química
Sistemas de elevación ergonómicos para uso seguro en zonas ATEX y salas blancas. Para una manipulación segura de productos químicos.
Leer más
Química
Renovables
Versatilidad en la manipulación de paneles solares en todas las fases de la logística.
Leer más
Renovables
Ergonomía = Economía
Las soluciones TAWI hacen que levantar hasta 270 kg no suponga ningún esfuerzo, permitiendo a todos los empleados realizar tareas de elevación y convirtiendo las tareas de dos personas en una sola.
Mejore la salud y la seguridad
Libere a los empleados de tener que levantar cargas pesadas y ayúdeles a mantenerse sanos y seguros.
Minimice el riesgo de que se caigan o dañen las mercancías
Mantenga a sus empleados alerta y eficientes durante todo el día, y sigan teniendo energía después del trabajo.
Aumente la flexibilidad de la plantilla
Cree un lugar de trabaj

Improved ROI at Yusen Logistics
TAWI's vacuum lifting equipment has removed 100% of the lift and has completely streamlined the process. In a timed experiment, the vacuum lifters are 20% more efficient, requiring 30% less labour.

Latest Lifting Insights
The Reality of Offloading Containers Today
Manually offloading containers can be a huge headache and a bottleneck for operations. A logistic expert shares a different way of doing it to improve efficiency and safety.
Read more
Improve Ergonomics & Safety with Packaging Automation Solutions
Poor packaging ergonomics create avoidable costs and disruptions. So, it’s important to have good material handling practices & equipment that protect workers’ safety and help facilities run smoothly.
Read more
5 Ways Sustainable Packaging  Impacts Material Handling
Sustainable packaging is becoming more popular in industries like food & beverage, consumer goods, and more. Explore how material handling processes need to adapt to lift these items in a way that’s safe for people and products.
Read more
Packaging Trends 2026
Explore current packaging trends like labour shortages and automated packaging systems. Staying up-to-date about trends can help facilities prepare, adapt, and stay competitive.
Read more
5 Steps to Improve Pharma Packaging & Logistics
Pharma facilities should evaluate their processes to determine if they have maximised efficiency for packaging and logistics operations. To do this, it is important to understand challenges that slow down operations and solutions that create more resilient workflows.
Read more
Read More Lifting Insights

products.text:
Vacuum Lifting Equipment | Product Range
Skip to content
Product Range
We make lifting easy for everyone. We provide a wide range of lifting equipment such as Vacuum Lifters, Trolleys and hoists.
Vacuum Lifters
Learn More
Mobile Vacuum Lifters
Learn More
Container Un/Loading Systems
Learn More
Portable Lifting Trolleys
Learn More
Hoists & Gripping Tools
Learn More
Crane Systems
Learn More
Ergonomic lifting with efficient material handling equipment
TAWI vacuum lift systems and other lifting devices enable ergonomic handling of sacks, boxes, drums, reels and more. Our wide selection of industrial lifting equipment, including vacuum lifters, lifting trolleys, hoists and crane systems ensure that we can offer you a complete solution. We can help you ensure easy and ergonomic lifting in your operations.
Lifting devices for a productive and ergonomic workplace
Through innovative Swedish engineering, TAWI material handling equipment help create a work environment where everyone can lift, increasing productivity and employee health. Easy lifting is the key to safe and efficient material handling, no matter what you need to lift.
Industrial equipment for easy lifting
Most manufacturing industries, logistic centres, and other businesses handling lightweight goods have a lot to gain from implementing some sort of lifting device in their workflow. Manufacturing industries often use
TAWI Lifting Trolleys
to mount reels in packaging machines, or to transport ready products from the production line.
Vacuum lifters
and
hoists
are frequently used for lifting raw material like wood or metal, food ingredients or chemicals. They are also great for the high frequency lifts that often occur at the end of a production line, or when packing products on pallets. TAWI lifting equipment help ensure ergonomic lifting and productivity in workplaces all over the world.
Experienced vacuum lifter manufacturer
TAWI has developed and manufactured vacuum lift systems for decades. With their combined vacuum lifting expertise, the TAWI team will make sure that you get the lift system best suited for your needs.
User-friendly and customised lifters
All TAWI lifting devices are developed with the user in mind, designed to make lifting easy for everyone, no matter where they work. We modify our products for customers, ensuring that your TAWI lifter will always meet your needs, increasing productivity in your business. Specific industry requirements and individual operator needs are considered in the development, making sure the device will be easy to use and will not interfere with any requirements set on your business.
Complete lift systems
Combined with
TAWI crane systems
, our vacuum assisted lifting devices make a complete vacuum lifting system, easily integrated in your business. In addition we also supply easy to use lifting trolleys and hoist lifts that can lift pretty much anything. As a complete supplier, TAWI will be the only partner you need when it comes to efficient and e
